overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a dark, stormy forest at night. The character moves steadily from an open area near stone ruins into increasingly dense woodland with atmospheric lighting.

events.description: beginning walk along dirt path adjacent to stone ruins with campfire glow
slight right turn as path curves away from ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path away from the stone ruins

entered.detail: ancient stone wall with weathered blocks and moss
warm orange light emanating from fire near the ruins
winding dirt trail with patches of grass
open grassy field with tall wild grass
dark silhouette of forest against the night sky
weathered wooden posts marking field boundaries

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path near ancient stone ruins with a campfire burning to the left. The open landscape features grassy meadows and scattered trees under a dark, cloudy night sky.

events.description: entering forest edge as trees close in on both sides of the path
ambient light decreases as forest canopy thickens overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path into the denser forest

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree with thick trunk and needle foliage
dense overhead tree cover beginning to block the sky
gnarled oak with spreading branches
large moss-covered boulders among the trees
snow-capped mountain peaks visible through tree gaps

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a forested area with large pine and oak trees closing in. Distant mountains become visible through the trees as the ambient light dims under the thickening canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with thick canopy

events.description: large tree trunk temporarily blocks right side of view
path becomes darker and more enclosed by dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the dark forest between thick tree trunks and rocky outcrops

entered.detail: decaying tree trunk lying beside the path
boulders covered in green moss and lichen
dense arrangement of large tree trunks flanking the path
steep rock wall rising through the trees
distant mountain summit visible through forest gaps

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through a dense, dark forest with thick tree trunks and mossy rocks lining the path. The canopy overhead blocks most of the sky, creating a sheltered, enclosed atmosphere.

events.description: forest opens up slightly with more sky visible overhead
gentle left turn following the curving path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path as it curves through more open woodland

entered.detail: white-barked tree with sparse foliage
open area with shorter grass and wildflowers
dark storm clouds visible through gaps in the canopy
clearing in the trees revealing distant landscape

segments.scene_description: The forest becomes slightly more open with birch trees and grassy clearings visible. The stormy night sky is partially visible through the canopy as the path curves gently toward a distant forest opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, ruin-strewn meadow into the oppressive depths of a dark forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path past ancient stone ruins and a flickering campfire, surrounded by grassy fields under a cloudy night sky. As he advances, the open landscape gradually narrows, and the path leads directly into a dense woodland where large pine and oak trees begin to close in. The scene then shifts as the ambient light dims under the thickening canopy, momentarily revealing distant mountains through the gaps in the foliage before the forest fully envelops the view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, dark woodland that gradually opens into a more expansive forest clearing. It begins on a winding trail flanked by thick tree trunks and mossy rocks, where a heavy canopy creates a sheltered and enclosed atmosphere. As the path curves gently, the dense foliage begins to thin, revealing patches of grassy clearings and the pale bark of birch trees. The scene then expands as the overhead cover breaks, allowing the stormy night sky to become partially visible before the camera moves toward a distant opening in the woods.
